film.title: Noobz
film.overview: Four friends hit the road to LA to compete in the Cyberbowl Video Game Championship, but will they be able to compete with the worst hangovers of their lives?

dialogues.dialogue: - Yes! - Watch it! Geek!  This chick isn't fooling us. We know exactly how her Friday nights will go:  Making Daddy proud.  Ah! This party's so sick, man!  It's time to recognize the new athletes of the 21st century.
